settings.title: Returns & Refunds
settings.subtitle: Hassle-Free Returns Within 30 Days
settings.description: Not happy with your purchase? We make returns easy. 30-day return window with free return shipping on most items. Full refund or exchange—your choice.

settings.title: Our Return Policy
settings.content:
30-Day Return Window

  • All returns must be initiated within 30 days of purchase
  • Counting starts from delivery date
  • Extensions available upon request for valid reasons

Conditions for Returns

  • Unused Items: Unopened, unused condition with original packaging
  • Lightly Used Items: Some categories allow returns if item is like-new (cosmetics excluded)
  • With Accessories: Original chargers, cables, and accessories must be included
  • Proof of Purchase: Original receipt or order confirmation required

Return Process

  1. Log in to your QuickBee account and find your order
  2. Click 'Initiate Return' and select reason
  3. Schedule pickup or use our return label
  4. Package securely and hand over to delivery partner
  5. Refund processed within 5-7 business days after we receive item

Return Shipping

  • Free return shipping for orders over Rs 2,000
  • Prepaid return label provided for all returns
  • Original shipping cost not refunded (unless defective item)

settings.liquid:
Refund Timeline

Day 1-2: Return Initiated

You initiate return and receive prepaid label

Pickup Scheduled

Day 3-5: In Transit

Return is picked up and in transit to our warehouse

Shipping

Day 6-8: Received

We receive and inspect the returned item

Processing

Day 9-14: Refunded

Refund processed to original payment method

Completed

settings.title: Return Exceptions & Special Cases
settings.content:
Non-Returnable Items

  • Customized or personalized products (unless defective)
  • Intimate apparel and swimwear (for hygiene reasons)
  • Consumable items (food, cosmetics, medications)
  • Digital products and downloadable content
  • Items purchased on clearance or 'final sale' (check product listing)

Defective Items

If you receive a defective or damaged item:

  • Contact us within 24 hours of delivery with photos
  • We'll provide a prepaid return label immediately
  • No questions asked—we'll replace or refund
  • Original shipping cost refunded

Change of Mind Returns

Not happy with your purchase but item is unused?

  • Eligible for return within 30 days
  • Return shipping cost is your responsibility (unless order was over Rs 2,000)
  • Full product refund minus original shipping

Bulk Orders (10+ units)

  • Custom return terms may apply
  • Contact our wholesale team for details
  • Generally 14-day return window for bulk orders
